label: Storm Slab — Rapid Loading Event  (Jan 15, 36h storm cycle)
description: A Pacific frontal system delivers 48 cm of new snow over 36 hours at Morrissey Ridge. Temperatures start at -14°C and rise to -4°C during the storm. Wind is light (<20 km/h). The system correctly identifies critical storm slab loading and escalates from Moderate → Considerable → High.
